channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Meccha Chameleon: Steam's Viral Sensation
item.description: Meccha Chameleon is taking Steam by storm, blending creativity and gameplay. Players are flocking to this unique title, making it a viral hit.

item.title: White House Uses GTA 6 Meme for Distraction
item.description: The White House posted a parody GTA 6 cover featuring Trump, aiming to divert attention from current issues. The move has sparked mixed reactions online.

item.title: Google Health 5.02 Update Brings New Features
item.description: Google Health's latest update, version 5.02, enhances the app with new features like hourly activity tracking and nap reminders. The update is rolling out for both iOS and Android.

item.title: Borderlands Bounty Pack 3 Introduces New Content
item.description: Bounty Pack 3 for Borderlands 4 features a new raid and introduces Loveless as the next Vault Hunter. Players can expect new loot and challenges.

item.title: God of War Laufey Lacks Unique Identity
item.description: IGN critiques God of War Laufey for its similarities to Kratos' Norse saga. The shift in perspective to Faye doesn't fully establish its own identity.

item.title: Tethergeist: A Unique Puzzle Platformer
item.description: Tethergeist offers a fresh take on the puzzle platformer genre, introducing innovative mechanics and engaging gameplay. It's a must-try for fans of the genre.

item.title: Free Play Days Offers New Xbox Games
item.description: Free Play Days returns with a selection of free Xbox games for subscribers, including Two Point Museum and PGA Tour 2K25. Enjoy gaming without cost this weekend.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Camera Bump to Increase
item.description: Leaks suggest the iPhone 18 Pro will feature a larger camera bump with thicker lenses. This change aims to improve photography capabilities.

item.title: Ultra-Black Car Paint Absorbs 99.9% Light
item.description: Researchers have developed an ultra-black car paint that absorbs 99.9% of visible light, creating a striking visual effect. This innovation could revolutionize automotive design.

item.title: Warhammer Community Showcases New Miniatures
item.description: The Warhammer community showcases new Orks and Space Marines miniatures, highlighting the creativity of community painters. Fans can see impressive new designs.

item.title: Google Calendar Expands Color Options
item.description: Google Calendar now offers 200 custom color options for events, enhancing personalization. This update addresses previous limitations and improves user experience.

item.title: Xbox Game Pass Adds Two Day One Releases
item.description: Xbox Game Pass announces two new 'day one' releases for July 2026, expanding its game library. This addition promises exciting new content for subscribers.

item.title: Digimon Story: Time Stranger Update Announced
item.description: A free update for Digimon Story: Time Stranger launches on July 9, adding new features like the Terriermon Assistant and graphics mode options. Available on multiple platforms.

item.title: My Hero Academia: All’s Justice Release Dates Announced
item.description: My Hero Academia: All’s Justice will launch on Switch 2 on September 3 in Japan and September 4 worldwide. Fans eagerly await this new title.

item.title: No Law: A Living Cybergrunge Open World
item.description: No Law promises an immersive open world filled with NPCs and interactive buildings. Developer Neon Giant aims to create a vibrant cyberpunk experience.
